text: For I desired mercy, and not sacrifice; and the knowledge of God more than burnt offerings.

gcb.mirror: God reveals that covenant faithfulness is deeper than ritual performance.
gcb.water: True repentance cleanses worship from empty form.

text: And it shall come to pass afterward, that I will pour out my spirit upon all flesh.

gcb.mirror: God reveals a future widening of His presence among His people.
gcb.water: The Spirit is poured out as renewal and empowerment.

text: But let judgment run down as waters, and righteousness as a mighty stream.

gcb.mirror: Justice reveals the moral weight of covenant life.

text: For the day of the LORD is near upon all the heathen.

gcb.mirror: No nation stands outside divine reckoning.
gcb.water: Judgment levels false security among the proud.
gcb.fire: The day of the Lord consumes arrogant power.

gcb.mirror: Deliverance reveals that salvation originates in God alone.
gcb.fire: Salvation breaks human control and reorients the prophet.

text: But thou, Bethlehem Ephratah... out of thee shall he come forth unto me that is to be ruler in Israel.

gcb.mirror: God reveals kingdom through humble beginnings.
gcb.water: Bethlehem becomes a vessel of promise.
gcb.fire: Messianic prophecy burns through political expectations.

text: The LORD is good, a strong hold in the day of trouble.

gcb.mirror: God is revealed as both judge and refuge.
gcb.water: Goodness shelters the faithful in trouble.

text: The just shall live by his faith.

gcb.mirror: Faith reveals how the righteous endure delay and disorder.
gcb.water: Trust steadies the soul while history trembles.
gcb.fire: Faith burns brighter when the vision tarries.

text: The LORD thy God in the midst of thee is mighty; he will save, he will rejoice over thee with joy.

gcb.mirror: God reveals Himself as present, mighty, and rejoicing over His people.
gcb.water: Salvation gathers and quiets the remnant.
gcb.fire: Joy burns through fear after judgment.

text: Go up to the mountain, and bring wood, and build the house.

gcb.mirror: Restoration requires action, not sentiment alone.
gcb.water: Obedience rebuilds what neglect has left broken.

text: Not by might, nor by power, but by my spirit, saith the LORD of hosts.

gcb.mirror: God reveals that true restoration comes by divine power, not human force.
gcb.water: Dependence reorders labor under the Spirit.

text: But unto you that fear my name shall the Sun of righteousness arise with healing in his wings.

gcb.mirror: God reveals healing through the light of righteousness.
gcb.water: Reverence prepares the soul for restoration.
gcb.fire: The rising light burns away darkness and delay.
